description.en: Show StudySapuri learning activity in Discord Rich Presence, including dashboard browsing, course pages, and active lesson playback.
description.ja: スタディサプリでの学習状況を Discord Rich Presence に表示します。ダッシュボード、講座ページ、動画講義の再生状況に対応しています。

settings.title: Show Timestamp
settings.description: Show playback timestamps only while a lesson video is actively playing.
